metadata.description: Private skill marketplace for Flagrant and partner clients

plugins.name: adr
plugins.description: Write an Architecture Decision Record (ADR), or advise whether a decision is ADR-worthy. Use when the user says "write an ADR", "record this decision", "document this architecture decision", "is this ADR-worthy?", "should we write an ADR for…", or is making a choice that affects structure, non-functional characteristics, dependencies, interfaces, or construction techniques. Also use when the user wants to backfill historical ADRs for decisions already made.
